mapper.select: select l.*, u.username, u.real_name, op.real_name as operator_name from sys_user_audit_log l left join sys_user u on u.id = l.user_id left join sys_user op on op.id = l.operator_user_id where l.user_id = #{userId} order by l.create_time desc, l.id desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select count(1) from sys_user_audit_log where user_id = #{userId}
